# Provail Restoration of Bloomfield

> 24/7 emergency water damage restoration, fire damage, mold remediation, and storm-damage services for Oakland and Macomb counties in southeast Michigan. IICRC-certified crews, 60-minute on-site response, and direct insurance billing.

Business: Provail Restoration of Bloomfield
Address: 4060 W Maple Rd, Bloomfield Township, MI 48301
Phone: (248) 531-8404
Hours: 24 hours, 7 days a week
Service area: Oakland County and Macomb County, Michigan (Bloomfield, Birmingham, Troy, Royal Oak, Rochester, Rochester Hills, Auburn Hills, Lake Orion, Oakland Township, Shelby Township, Macomb Township)

## Core services

- [Water Damage Restoration](https://provailrestoration.com/water-damage-restoration): Extraction, structural drying, and moisture mapping for residential and commercial properties.
- [Fire Damage Restoration](https://provailrestoration.com/fire-damage-restoration): Soot removal, structural repair, and deodorization after fire and smoke events.
- [Storm Damage Restoration](https://provailrestoration.com/storm-damage-restoration): Wind, hail, flood, and tree-impact response with same-day board-up and tarping.
- [Mold Remediation](https://provailrestoration.com/mold-remediation): IICRC S520 containment, HEPA filtration, and post-remediation clearance testing.
- [Sewage Cleanup](https://provailrestoration.com/sewage-cleanup): Category-3 biohazard extraction, disposal, and sanitization.
- [Reconstruction Services](https://provailrestoration.com/reconstruction-services): Full rebuild from demo through final finishes under one licensed contractor.
- [Commercial Restoration](https://provailrestoration.com/commercial-restoration): Business-continuity restoration for offices, retail, and multi-tenant buildings.
- [Insurance Claims Help](https://provailrestoration.com/insurance-claims-help): Direct billing to carriers, Xactimate estimating, and adjuster coordination.

## Specialty services

- [Basement Flood Cleanup](https://provailrestoration.com/services/basement-flood-cleanup)
- [Frozen Pipe Repair](https://provailrestoration.com/services/frozen-pipe-repair)
- [Sump Pump Failure](https://provailrestoration.com/services/sump-pump-failure)
- [Ice Dam Removal](https://provailrestoration.com/services/ice-dam-removal)
- [Ceiling Water Damage Repair](https://provailrestoration.com/services/ceiling-water-damage-repair)
- [Hardwood Floor Water Damage](https://provailrestoration.com/services/hardwood-floor-water-damage)
- [Appliance Leak Water Damage](https://provailrestoration.com/services/appliance-leak-water-damage)
- [Smoke Odor Removal](https://provailrestoration.com/services/smoke-odor-removal)
- [Soot Cleanup](https://provailrestoration.com/services/soot-cleanup)
- [Contents Pack-Out and Storage](https://provailrestoration.com/services/contents-pack-out-storage)
